title: Classic Star Wars: A New Hope (comic series)
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}}
'''''Classic Star Wars: A New Hope''''' is a comic series that is part of the ''[[Classic Star Wars]]'' series of comics and re-publishes the original [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]] adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].

==Media==
===Issues===
*''[[Classic Star Wars: A New Hope 1]]''
*''[[Classic Star Wars: A New Hope 2]]''

===Collected in===
*<!-- 1995-11-XX -->[[Classic Star Wars: A New Hope (trade paperback)|''Classic Star Wars: A New Hope'' trade paperback]]
*''[[Star Wars Legends: The Newspaper Strips Omnibus]]''
